candidates.why: Clear top-line sales/revenue line at the top of the income statement; identical values to Total Revenue, so this is the preferred non-total label.
Also a valid revenue line, but it is a total/subtotal and duplicates Sales Revenues exactly.
Non-operating/other income, not top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Use Sales Revenues first; Total Revenue is a fallback label for years where the company may have reported revenue under that name.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost label; best match among candidates for COGS.
Also a direct cost label and plausible alternate reporting label across years.
Looks like an operating overhead/lab maintenance item rather than core cost of sales.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: CR:c|high|missing. Selected the direct cost labels from the income statement as alternative reporting labels over time. Change in inventory also relates to production costs, but it was not in the candidate list and the core COGS labels already exist.

candidates.why: Clear overhead component and a classic SG&A-related operating expense.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component when no explicit SG&A subtotal exists.
Could be an overhead component, but appears unpopulated in preview and is less central than the broader overhead rows.
Possible overhead component, but appears unpopulated in preview and may overlap with Other Operating Expenses.
Could be included in SG&A, but likely already embedded in personnel/operating expenses, so adding it risks double counting.
Balance sheet asset, not an operating expense line.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead buckets and excluded depreciation/amortization and potential duplicate share-based compensation to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Capitalized development asset on the balance sheet, not a period R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization related to capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Own product development, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value on the balance sheet, not an R&D expense line.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is visible on the income statement. Balance sheet development asset rows do not qualify as XRD.

Total finance expense line; valid if components were unavailable, but less preferred than granular recurring components.
Possible duplicate/alternate minor finance expense line; less consistently populated.

Semantically strong but unpopulated in preview and likely supplemental.

Not a finance cost.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense.
Not interest expense.

Equity/NCI line, not interest expense.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent/owners' equity line is shown.
Same concept with different capitalization; useful fallback label across years.
Balancing row, not the reported equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is provided, so total equity is used. MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

Correct concept for minority interest, but appears absent/unpopulated.

Income statement total allocation line, not preferred and appears effectively zero/absent.
Dividend flow, not minority interest balance.
